workflow.en: Fix Must items first: wrong entities, unsupported names, extra goal assertions, and prematch action mistakes.
workflow.zh: 先处理 Must：错误实体、无依据姓名、额外进球声明、赛前动作误判。

workflow.en: Run final evaluation gates again; do not polish style before factual blockers are gone.
workflow.zh: 重新运行终稿门禁；事实阻塞项清零前，不优先做风格润色。

workflow.en: Then handle Should items: duplicate goals, color fallback, and raw visual wording.
workflow.zh: 再处理 Should：重复进球、颜色 fallback、原始画面式措辞。
